title: armeria maritima var. berlengensis
intro: Armeria maritima var. berlengensis, also known as the Berlenga Thrift or Sea Thrift, is a subspecies of the Sea Thrift plant, a low-growing, evergreen perennial native to the Berlenga Islands off the coast of Portugal. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as wounds, urinary issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. berlengensis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used topically in the form of creams and salves.
